_meta.description: Labeled grounding extraction corpus (P3-T1). Each case has a draft, the objects_seen list, and 'planted' material claims. A planted claim is recalled iff some extracted claim unit contains its 'needle' substring (normalized comparison is done in the test). 'class' groups cases into the seven named adversarial classes plus the purely-conversational zero-flag class. Recall is measured overall AND per class; conversational cases must yield ZERO claims.

cases.draft: Our revenue for the quarter was $4.2M. Cash on hand sits at $1,100,000.
